name: profile-react-perf-lab
description: A/B lab measuring @sentry/react load overhead on a realistic, request-heavy profile page

scripts.build:no-sentry: pnpm run gen-assets && vite build --mode no-sentry --outDir dist/no-sentry --emptyOutDir
scripts.build:errors-only: pnpm run gen-assets && vite build --mode errors-only --outDir dist/errors-only --emptyOutDir
scripts.build:tracing: pnpm run gen-assets && vite build --mode tracing --outDir dist/tracing --emptyOutDir
scripts.build:tracing-replay: pnpm run gen-assets && vite build --mode tracing-replay --outDir dist/tracing-replay --emptyOutDir
scripts.build:matrix: pnpm run build:no-sentry && pnpm run build:errors-only && pnpm run build:tracing && pnpm run build:tracing-replay
